steps.assistant_text: Second -O0 island carved from tail3a (TRUNCATE 0x134, sits in front of o0_117FC). Keys: direct global store D=0 emits at-fused single-lui sw; the 3-arg call needs DIRECT bare-symbol reads (new undefined_syms entries D_bu_116C8_34/_40) — *(int*)(&D+0x34) spelling lets cfe DAG-share &D across all three args and loses the per-arg lui pairs; both vtable dispatches embed the register-var assignment in the CALL ARG (DAG-shares &D between the p-load and the +&D addend, callee reuses p); fused-|| alloc guard on the register var (o0_117FC lever); frame -0x30/local@0x24 = two int locals with the live one declared second.

metadata.verification: 77/77 word-exact (only link-resolved reloc fields differ pre-link) + ROM byte-identical (new -O0 split unit)
